name: Gluep (Gak)
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Elmers craft glue - White or colored
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a solution of the water and borax, mixing well.
2. In a separate bowl, mix 1 tbsp glue and 1 tbsp water.
3. Stir in a scant 2 tbsp of the borax solution into the glue and water mixture.
4. Continue stirring until the mixture becomes thick.
5. Knead the Gluep until it is thick.
6. Roll it, pop it, stretch it, bounce it.
7. Put it in a plastic bag in the refrigerator to keep it pliable.
